terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to Interdomestik Asistenca. These terms govern your membership.

sections.membership: Membership is valid for 1 year from the date of purchase. It includes access to our protection network and discount mediation.
sections.services: We provide claim handling assistance, legal consultation, and damage assessment.
sections.fees: Membership fees are non-refundable after the 30-day guarantee period. Success fees apply only upon successful claim recovery.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. Included in your membership is strict data protection.

handling.title: How we handle your data
handling.body: We collect only the information required to provide membership services, process claims, and comply with legal obligations. Access is restricted by role and tenant scope.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: You can request access to your stored data, request correction, and request deletion where legally permitted.

deletion.title: Deletion requests
deletion.body: Authenticated users can submit a deletion request using the endpoint below with an optional JSON body.
deletion.followup: Requests are logged as compliance events and reviewed by operations before irreversible deletion actions are performed.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: We use essential cookies to keep the portal secure and functional. Optional analytics cookies are enabled only after explicit consent.
cookies.preference: You can change your preference at any time by revisiting the cookie banner controls during your session.
